'''Ralme IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector's]] [[Ralme system/Legends|Ralme system]]. Ralme IV was the site of [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation overseen by [[Lant Mining Corporation]]. Two of the [[Miner/Legends|miners]] were the parents of future Brak sector [[Crime lord/Legends|crimelord]] [[Qual'om Soach]].<ref name="FBS" />
